description: Open toed, brown sandals with slip-on styling, thong style straps with rivet details all over and an elasticated, multi-coloured strap across the midfootSoft footbed with branding at the heelDurable, tough outsole with textured patterns all over15 days warranty for sole debonding only; no warranty on studs, sequins or other accessories (warranty not valid on products under discount or promotional offer)
